arts.ttl: England boss Thomas Tuchel slammed by World Cup winner over 'damaging' style

arts.sum: Myles Lewis-Skelly has enjoyed a meteoric rise with Arsenal and England this season – and he owes a lot of his recent success to his mentality, as well as his talent

arts.ttl: Harry Kane: Premier League rival of Man United become 'favourites' to sign Bayern Munich, England striker
arts.sum: A Premier League club, which is not Manchester United, reportedly emerge as the 'favourites' to sign Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Branthwaite expected to consider Everton future after England snub
arts.sum: Jarrad Branthwaite is expected to further consider his Everton future after being left out of Thomas Tuchel's first England squad, Sky Sports News understands.

arts.ttl: How England should line up vs Latvia with Thomas Tuchel making 5 changes

arts.ttl: England: Marcus Rashford and Phil Foden face pivotal night in bid to stay in Thomas Tuchel's plans
